MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN REPLY TO PLTFS OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT AGI CAPITAL GROUP, INC. (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS "AGI CAPITAL")

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS HOPEWELL INVESTMENT CO. AND A.G.I. CAPITAL GROUP, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, DEFENDANTS TO ANSWER OR OTHERWISE PLEAD WITHIN TWENTY DAYS OF THE ORDER. RES JUDICATA DOES NOT BAR THE CLAIMS. WONDOWSKI WAS NOT A PLAINTIFF IN THE RENT BOARD ACTION AND FLEMING WAS NOT INVOVLED. THIS ACTION ALSO ALLEGES PROBLEMS THAT ARE PRESENTLY EXISTING. FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION: THE ALLEGATIONS RELATED TO MAINTENANCE OF THE FRONT DOOR ARE SUFFICIENT. SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION: ALLEGED LACK OF SECURITY, WATER DAMAGE AND PROBLEMS WITH THE FRONT DOOR ARE SUFFICIENT. THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION: GUNTER DOES NOT REQUIRE THAT THE TENANT VACATE. FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION: THE COVENANT IS APPLICABLE TO LEASES. FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION: PLAINTIFFS ALLEGE A SPECIAL RELATIONSHIP - LANDLORD AND TENANT. SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION: BROKEN PIPES, FLOODING, STALLED ELEVATOR ALLEGATIONS ARE SUFFICIENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR 11332

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS HOPEWELL INVESTMENT CO. AND A.G.I. CAPITAL GROUP, INC.'S MOTION TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF SEVEN DOCUMENTS. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR 11332
